creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please repocopy databases/db51 to databases/db5 (not db52!) - I plan to
create a new port, based on db51, that follows the latest db5.X release
from Oracle so as to avoid the mess that db4.x needlessly(1) left
behind, which will start out as db5-5.2.

(1) pkgsrc got away with just one db4 port, why can't we? Let's try for
db5.x.
